message:
feat(conformance): add pthread thread lifecycle executors (bd-d1vi)

Add conformance test executors for 5 pthread thread functions:
- pthread_self: returns POSITIVE_TID for non-zero thread ID
- pthread_equal: handles self==self (1) and thread_a!=thread_b (0)
- pthread_join: handles null (EINVAL) and self (EDEADLK) cases
- pthread_detach: handles null (EINVAL) case
- pthread_create: placeholder for thread lifecycle tests

Dynamic handle cases are skipped with SKIP_DYNAMIC_HANDLE marker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
